creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gerard Seibert from comment #173)

The problem is not that no-one is working on it, the problem is that
hsp, who might be able to fix it, does not have a hardware where he can reproduce the problem.

So normally, users bisect in the commits until they find the commit in question or hsp@ somehow gets access to a system where it occurs to debug it.
